title: Olay-Tetikli Confluence Testi -- Stage 0 pre-registration (backtest engine + forward recorder)
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any measurement is run and BEFORE results are seen. DEC-046 FROZEN; no post-hoc relaxation (no Holm->FDR, no >=0.95 -> >=0.90, no horizon/threshold widening). N-LOCK: exactly 3 event types, technical-confirmation parameters fixed now, NO parameter sweeping.
no_measurement_this_round: No verdict is produced this round: no frozen historical event data (backtest is data_pending) and the forward recorder has only just started accruing. Deliverable = engines + pre-registration + data-feasibility. Verdict comes once a sufficient sample exists (backtest data/token OR forward accrual >= MIN_EVENTS_PER_TYPE).

basis.final_research: RR-040 (SWING: event-driven foundation -- PEAD/mechanical-events/hybrid; 'olay-driven mimari: GATE+TRIGGER+opsiyonel FILTER'); RR-041 (SINYAL: exit-stripped, look-ahead-free signal-quality measurement -- fixed-horizon forward return + mandatory random-benchmark)
basis.structural_warning: RR-040/RR-041 + the broader record warn that unconditional cross-sectional/IC/random-null tests can STRUCTURALLY MISS an event-driven, sparse, conditional edge -> D-185/D-186 'pure-technical eliminated' does NOT transfer to event-driven.
basis.what_was_eliminated: D-185/D-186 eliminated PURE-technical short-term swing (failed fair null; edge was nominal drift + exit-mechanism, not entry timing). D-187 eliminated active exposure-timing (200-MA switch). This test addresses the still-open EVENT-TRIGGERED subset.
basis.drift_lesson: D-186: ~72-80% of the apparent edge was nominal drift -> all returns measured XU100-relative; surprise measured as REAL (TUFE-deflated) YoY, not nominal.
basis.relative_basis_support: NRR-001-SCREENING sec.3 (measure RS relative-to-index, not absolute nominal). CAVEAT: NRR-001-SCREENING.md is currently UNTRACKED in this clone -> NOT record-grade evidence; a separate commit decision is left to Cagan/Orchestrator. NRR_EXPLORE.md is only a probe BRIEF (no committed verdict in this clone) and is NOT cited as validation.
basis.decision_authority: DEC-039 (program MEASURES + recommends; promotion into the Yol-1 lab is an Orchestrator+Cagan decision).

hypothesis: When a CATALYST EVENT (E1 earnings-surprise / E2 index-inclusion / E3 material-KAP) ALIGNS with TECHNICAL CONFIRMATION (volume surge + breakout), the post-event short-term (5/20/60d) forward return significantly beats BOTH (a) an event-conditional random-technical null AND (b) a no-event random-technical null. Confluence = the intersection outperforms the sum of the parts; a standalone event OR standalone technical may suffice on its own.

A_backtest_engine.status: built; synthetic-tested now; runs on history once data/token provided
A_backtest_engine.data: data_pending (E1 needs MKK_VYK_TOKEN via kap_historical_fetcher + KAP-4.0 depth; E2/E3 no frozen historical source)

B_forward_recorder.status: built; manual-trigger by default (cron deferred); starts accruing from FORWARD_RECORDING_START
B_forward_recorder.data: auth-free real-time KAP feed (src/data/kap_scraper.py _fetch_kap_api / fetch_kap_news) -> NO token needed; recent-only, WAF-fragile (handled gracefully)
B_forward_recorder.preregistration_guarantee: the signal (event + technical-confirm + entry price at t+1) is RECORDED with empty forward-return fields BEFORE the outcome is observed; t+5/+20/+60 returns are filled in a separate later pass. as_of_timestamp < fill_time -> look-ahead / overfit / survivorship are structurally impossible.

E2_index_inclusion.note: binary event; backtest data_pending (no frozen BIST index-membership-change source); forward via announcement disclosures if accessible

E3_material_kap.note: category event; backtest data_pending (ODA pagination needs token); forward via material-event disclosures (auth-free)

technical_confirmation_frozen.volume_surge: event-day volume / trailing 20-bar volume MA (excl. event bar) > 1.5
technical_confirmation_frozen.breakout: event-day close > prior 20-bar high (excl. event bar)
technical_confirmation_frozen.look_ahead: uses only data up to and including the event bar

event_study.action: t+1 (enter the bar AFTER the disclosure; speed disadvantage modelled, not assumed away)
event_study.cost_model: 50 bps round-trip (RR-038) + 20 bps event-day slippage = 70 bps total

two_nulls.NULL_1_event_conditional: on the SAME event days, technical confirmation assigned at RANDOM -> does technical add value to the event itself?
two_nulls.NULL_2_no_event: on RANDOM non-event days, the SAME technical confirmation -> does the event add value to the technical signal?
two_nulls.rule: confluence is REAL only if it beats BOTH nulls

multiple_testing: Holm-Bonferroni applied SEPARATELY PER EVENT TYPE (across the 3 horizons) -- NOT pooled across all types (the report's methodological correction; Faz 0 lowvol60 Holm-rejection lesson).

passes_if_ALL: (3) XU100-relative forward return POSITIVE after cost+slippage
decision_rule_DEC046.fails_if: any of the above fails -> event-confluence does not carry edge for that type; if all 3 types fail, the last subset of swing closes too.
decision_rule_DEC046.undetermined_if: sample < MIN_EVENTS_PER_TYPE (30) -> 'undetermined, sample accruing' (NOT pass/fail; honest for slow forward accrual + sparse events)
decision_rule_DEC046.no_post_hoc_relaxation: rule is FROZEN; not loosened after seeing results.

realistic_expectation: Even if an edge exists, the prior is a FEW-POINTS XU100-relative edge, NOT a multiplier (Bessembinder: ex-ante top-name pre-selection is statistically very hard). 'No edge' is also a valid, valuable result (anchors to Yol 2).
caveats: Backtest data_pending for all 3 event types (token / no frozen source) -> measurement deferred.
Forward accrual is SLOW (events are sparse) -> small-n for a long time; verdict gated on MIN_EVENTS_PER_TYPE.
Auth-free KAP feed is recent-only + WAF-fragile -> forward capture may be intermittent; misses are logged, not fabricated.
yfinance OHLCV survivors-only -> any eventual backtest is an UPPER BOUND.
E2/E3 backtest require a separate data-provisioning directive.
outputs: src/screening/event_config.py, event_detect.py, event_confirm.py, event_study.py, event_null.py, event_runner.py, event_forward_recorder.py
